title: Draymond Green rips Jaylen Brown’s comments as ‘excuse-making’

bullets: Boston Celtics "Honestly, you don’t know the answer because he didn’t win.

title: Mass. man reportedly stabbed to death near Times Square in New York City
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Local News The 39-year-old man is reportedly from Massachusetts, while police declined to identify the victim pending family notification.
A Massachusetts man was fatally stabbed in front of a restaurant near Times Square in Manhattan Monday night, according to police and reports.
Officers responded to a 911 call reporting an assault at 132 West 43rd St.

title: Craig Breslow, Alex Cora reportedly disagreed on this part of Red Sox roster
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Red Sox "I like where it’s at and switching things like that in the middle of a season, especially at this level, is hard to do.
”​ Alex Cora and Craig Breslow reportedly butted heads over parts of the Red Sox roster earlier this season.

Barry Chin/The Boston Globe By Conor Ryan May 5, 2026 | 5:27 PM 2 minutes to read Speaking a day after the Red Sox fired manager Alex Cora and several of his coaches, chief baseball officer Craig Breslow pushed back against talk of any clash of baseball ideologies between himself and Boston’s longtime manager.

title: As Marblehead finally passes MBTA Act zoning, a resident asks: ‘Are we kinda being pricks?’
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Local News “Are we trying to do nothing?
Because it seems like we’re doing nothing.

” Jessica Rinaldi/Boston Globe Staff, File Marblehead approved new zoning for multifamily housing Monday, seemingly settling its differences with the MBTA Communities Act after years of debate and legal wrangling.
